s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT SIDE TRAY ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the clip and remove the luggage compartment side tray assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT TRIM HOOK

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and the 2 No. 1 luggage compartment trim hooks.
Disengage the 7 clips and remove the rear floor finish plate.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT INNER TRIM COVER LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 clips and the luggage compartment inner trim cover LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT INNER TRIM COVER RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 clips and the luggage compartment inner trim cover RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE DOOR HINGE TORSION BAR RH

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the luggage door hinge torsion bar RH from the luggage compartment door torsion bar support as shown in the illustration.
Using SST, disconnect the luggage door hinge torsion bar RH from the luggage door hinge and the right side of the vehicle body as shown in the illustration.
Remove the luggage door hinge torsion bar RH from the left side of the vehicle body as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE DOOR HINGE TORSION BAR LH

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the luggage door hinge torsion bar LH from the luggage compartment door torsion bar support as shown in the illustration.
Using SST, disconnect the luggage door hinge torsion bar LH from the luggage door hinge and the left side of the vehicle body as shown in the illustration.
Remove the luggage door hinge torsion bar LH from the right side of the vehicle body as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT DOOR TORSION BAR SUPPORT

s2.ptxt: Remove the luggage compartment door torsion bar support as shown in the illustration.
